verdict_reasoning: TGN46/TGN38 is a type I TM protein predominantly resident in the trans-Golgi network but cycles between TGN, endosomes, and the plasma membrane via the secretory/endocytic pathway. A documented minority surface pool is reached during this cycling (widely exploited as an internalization marker), giving its own TM anchor on the PM during the surface phase. This fits dual_localization with a minor but real PM fraction alongside a dominant TGN home.
